name: SOC 2 Report
description: SOC 2 Type I or Type II attestation report from an accredited auditor covering security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, or privacy trust services criteria.

report_type.description: Type I (point-in-time) or Type II (over a period)

report_period_start.description: Start date of the audit period (YYYY-MM-DD)

report_period_end.description: End date of the audit period (YYYY-MM-DD). For Type I, same as start date.

trust_services_criteria.description: Trust services criteria covered by the report

exceptions_noted.description: Whether any exceptions or deviations were noted in the report

exceptions_count.description: Number of exceptions or deviations noted

cuec_count.description: Number of Complementary User Entity Controls (CUECs) listed

subservice_organizations.description: Subservice organizations included or carved out

carve_out_method.description: True if subservice organizations are carved out, false if inclusive
